## English

Windows testing build for CS Analyzer.

Highlights:

- Tactics analysis and scouting are the primary focus.
- FACEIT works out of the box with the bundled beta API key.
- Perfect World account import, login, scouting, and demo processing are included.
- Auto-update is disabled for this beta. Please upgrade manually from GitHub releases.

Guides:

- Testing Guide (EN): https://github.com/akiver/cs-demo-manager/blob/main/TESTING-GUIDE.en.md
- Testing Guide (ZH-CN): https://github.com/akiver/cs-demo-manager/blob/main/TESTING-GUIDE.zh-CN.md

## 简体中文

这是 CS Analyzer 的 Windows 测试预发布版本。

重点：

- 本版主打 tactics 分析和 scouting 流程。
- FACEIT 已内置 beta API key，默认无需手填。
- 包含 Perfect World 账号导入、登录、scouting 和 demo 处理。
- 这个 beta 关闭了应用内自动更新，请从 GitHub Releases 手动升级。
